Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Yaofu Run Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yaofurun Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. demonstrates the ultimate exaggerated form of the 'all-purpose business license' in grassroots commerce. The official commercial system conventionally assigned it to 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the physical engine's scan reveals an absurd reality: the enterprise's 2024 insured headcount is only '1 person,' the paid-in capital is 610,000 RMB, and the registered address is located in 'Room 3110' of Building 3 on Junnong Road. Inside a single office room on the 31st floor, relying on 1 employee, not only must it 'manufacture' electronic devices, but it also has to follow what is written on its business license to 'manufacture furniture, metal structures, cork products, paper products, and hardware products'? This is completely impossible under the laws of physics. Diagnostic conclusion: this is an extremely typical one-person Micro-Trading Agency. The owner (Liao Changyan) registered a shell company encompassing almost all common commodity categories, essentially to flip lighting fixtures, office furniture, hardware materials, and electronic components on B2B procurement, engineering supply chains, or e-commerce platforms, facilitating the issuance of various invoices at any time. It absolutely possesses no physical manufacturing capability.
